title: disperis ciliata
intro: Disperis ciliata, also known as the hair-pod disperis, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Disperis ciliata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. In terms of herbal preparations, Disperis ciliata can be consumed as a decoction or infused in tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
